name: pi-terminal
description: Integrated terminal panel for pi coding agent — read/write a persistent shell, inject terminal context into LLM prompts

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('node-pty');console.log('node-pty: prebuild OK')}catch(e){console.warn('node-pty prebuild failed, rebuilding from source...');require('child_process').execSync('npm rebuild node-pty',{stdio:'inherit',cwd:__dirname})}" || true
